title: State lawmakers turn to creative solutions in speaker fights
shortDescription: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — As Republican infighting debilitates Washington, lawmakers at some U.S. statehouses have managed to launch sessions complicated by similar GOP partisan divides or razor-thin margins of party control with a host of creative — if yet untested — solutions.

title: From Trump to governor: Sanders prepares to take on new role
shortDescription: LITTLE ROCK, Ark. (AP) — After running a campaign heavily focused on national politics and her time as President Donald Trump's spokeswoman, Sarah Huckabee Sanders says she wants to keep her attention on Arkansas as she takes charge as the state's 47th governor.

title: Biden to get a firsthand look at US-Mexico border situation
Boebert’s backers urge her to ‘tone down the nasty rhetoric’
shortDescription: RIFLE, Colo. (AP) — Debbie Hartman voted for Lauren Boebert for Congress in 2020 and again in 2022, delighted by Boebert's unequivocal defense of cultural issues that animate the Republican Party's far right flank.

title: Speaker McCarthy: A weakened leader or emboldened survivor?
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican Kevin McCarthy is the new House speaker, but as bruising as it was for him to seize the gavel in a history-making election, it may be even more difficult for the embattled leader to do much with the powerful position — or to even keep it.

title: Big week for US-Mexico ties going into North American summit
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — It's been a big week for U.S.-Mexico relations, and that was even before President Joe Biden becomes the first U.S. leader to visit Mexico in nearly a decade.

title: Biden faces Israel quandary with new Netanyahu government
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s new government is little more than a week old but it's already giving the Biden administration headaches.Just days into its mandate, a controversial member of Netanyahu’s right-wing Cabinet riled U.S.

title: Chaos in the House: McCarthy’s plea, and begging for votes
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — It was the extraordinary moment that brought House Republicans to the brink — and ultimately the moment they found their way back.Just one vote short of becoming speaker of the House, California Republican Kevin McCarthy stood from his chair and walked down the center aisle to the back of the chamber.

title: Nevada AG mum on investigation of 6 GOP electors in 2020
shortDescription: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford won’t say if the state is investigating the six Republican electors who submitted fake electoral certificates declaring Donald Trump the winner of the presidential 2020 election.

title: New Mexico high court to hear congressional maps challenge
shortDescription: SANTA FE, N.M. (AP) — The New Mexico Supreme Court is expected to hear a case this week challenging the state’s new congressional maps.The hearing scheduled Monday would come about three months after the high court ordered a stay in proceedings in a lawsuit brought by the state's Republican Party, according to the Santa Fe New Mexican.

title: Aid convoy enters Syrian rebel area ahead of key UN vote
shortDescription: IDLIB, Syria (AP) — A humanitarian convoy on Sunday delivered urgently needed supplies to Syria's last rebel stronghold, a day before the U.N. Security Council is set to vote on a resolution that would determine whether aid deliveries to the war-stricken territory can continue.

title: Virginia lawmakers returning for short election-year session
shortDescription: RICHMOND, Va. (AP) — The part-time, politically divided Virginia General Assembly is set to convene this week in Richmond for its annual sprint of a legislative session. Members of the Republican-controlled House of Delegates and Democratic-held Senate will meet for at least 30 days to debate issues ranging from taxes to abortion to energy policy in an election year when every legislative seat is on the ballot.

title: New Mexico delegation seeks changes to wildfire aid rules
shortDescription: SANTA FE, N.M. (AP) — New Mexico’s congressional delegation says the U.S. government should make changes to rules proposed for processing damage claims stemming from a historic wildfire sparked by forest managers.

title: Idaho Legislature likely to focus on education, property tax
shortDescription: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Education funding, property tax relief and a tug of war over how best to use Idaho's whopping budget surplus will be a focus for lawmakers as they gather in Boise on Monday for the start of the 2023 legislative session.

title: Guest lineups for the Sunday news shows
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — ABC’s “This Week” — Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas; Reps. Scott Perry, R-Pa., and Andy Barr, R-Ky.; U.S. Capitol Police Officer Harry Dunn.

title: McCarthy elected House speaker in rowdy post-midnight vote
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican Kevin McCarthy was elected House speaker on a historic post-midnight 15th ballot early Saturday, overcoming holdouts from his own ranks and floor tensions that boiled over after a chaotic week that tested the new GOP majority’s ability to govern.

title: Shootings in Albuquerque share target: elected Democrats
shortDescription: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — Bullets flew through one home's front door and garage. At another home, three bullets went into the bedroom of a 10-year-old girl in a series of shootings that had at least one thing in common: They targeted the homes or offices of elected Democratic officials in New Mexico.

title: Clash over tax cuts coming in Kansas; abortion foes unsure
shortDescription: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — Kansas' recently reelected Democratic governor and Republican legislators are headed for a clash over how their financially flush state should cut taxes, and abortion opponents are wrestling with what ideas to pursue following last year's decisive statewide vote favoring abortion rights.

title: States target transgender health care in first bills of 2023
shortDescription: After a midterm election and record flow of anti-transgender legislation last year, Republican state lawmakers this year are zeroing in on questions of bodily autonomy with new proposals to limit gender-affirming health care and abortion access.

title: Jan. 6 remembrance led by Dems as GOP wrestled with rebels
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden conferred high honors on those who stood against the Jan. 6 Capitol mob two years ago and the menacing effort in state after state to upend the election, declaring “America is a land of laws, not chaos,” even as disarray rendered Congress dysfunctional for a fourth straight day.

title: Lame-duck Illinois lawmakers vote themselves a 16% raise
shortDescription: SPRINGFIELD, Ill. (AP) — Illinois House Democrats working in a lame-duck session left town for a weekend break Friday night — but not before voting on plans to give themselves a pay raise of nearly 16%.

title: Homeless crisis, a city overwhelmed: What Biden may see at El Paso border
shortDescription: If given the chance, the president will see the migrant crisis among people sleeping under Red Cross blankets outside Sacred Heart Catholic Church.

title: McCarthy's next battle: Rallying GOP behind deal he made with hard-liners
shortDescription: GOP Rep. Nancy Mace, a staunch Kevin McCarthy supporter, said she was "on the fence" about the rules package the speaker negotiated with hard-liners.

title: 70,000 US deaths: Can Biden and Mexico agree on fentanyl?
shortDescription: President Joe Biden heads to Mexico next week to discuss lethal fentanyl threat with Mexico's president. Analysts say U.S. needs much more cooperation

title: How a new Congress will change the direction of the country: What we know
shortDescription: Speaker Kevin McCarthy and the GOP have control of the House of Representatives. Meanwhile, Democrats hold the edge in the Senate.

title: Five Albuquerque Democrats' homes, offices targeted by shootings
shortDescription: Albuquerque police are investigating whether shootings targeting Democratic lawmakers homes and offices are connected or politically motivated.

title: Slain Jan. 6 rioter's mother arrested on Capitol attack anniversary
shortDescription: Video footage of Witthoeft's arrest shows Capitol Police officers telling her and other protestors to move to the "sidewalk now, or you're under arrest."

title: Norman Pattis, Alex Jones' lawyer, loses law license for 6 months
shortDescription: Norman Pattis, Alex Jones' attorney, is also representing Proud Boy Joseph Biggs in an ongoing seditious conspiracy trial in D.C.

title: Recap: On marathon 15th ballot, McCarthy wins House speaker vote
shortDescription: On a marathon fourth day, after a chaotic week for House Republicans, GOP Leader Rep. Kevin McCarthy won speaker of the House. Members were sworn in.

title: McCarthy elected House speaker on 15th vote
shortDescription: The GOP leader Kevin McCarthy was elected House speaker after historic 15 rounds of votes.

title: US appeals court blocks ban on rapid-fire ‘bump stocks’
shortDescription: A Trump administration ban on bump stocks was blocked by an appeals court. The device was banned after used by the gunman in the 2017 Las Vegas attack

title: Biden honoring those who showed courage during attack on Capitol
shortDescription: President Biden will bestow the nation's second highest civilian honor on a dozen people who stood up to attempts to overturn the 2020 election.

title: 13 House GOP members received campaign money from McCarthy but voted against him
shortDescription: Embattled speaker of the House hopeful Kevin McCarthy gave to 13 of the same people who are voting repeatedly to keep him from taking the gavel.

title: 'WTF is wrong with him?': How Jan. 6 shook loyalties of Trump aides
shortDescription: On Jan. 6, 2021, some Donald Trump aides sought to get him to denounce violence, others were frustrated by his failure to abide by election results.

title: Arrest of El Chapo's son results in Mexican cartel violence before Biden visit
shortDescription: Days before Biden's trip to Mexico, the country spiraled into violence after the arrest of Ovidio Guzmán, son of infamous drug lord known as "El Chapo."

title: Biden says Mexico will step up help on border
shortDescription: Ahead of his anticipated border trip, Biden said Mexico will accept the return of undocumented migrants from Venezuela, Cuba, Haiti and Nicaragua.

title: Rep. Cammack jabs Democrats during speaker vote
shortDescription: Rep. Kat Cammack riled up Democrats after accusing them of bringing "popcorn and blankets and alcohol" to vote on a new House speaker.

title: Rep. Crenshaw condemns GOP opposition to McCarthy
shortDescription: Rep. Dan Crenshaw criticized the Republicans voting against Rep. Kevin McCarthy for speaker, saying that 'they are enemies now.'

title: George Santos nearly misses call for speaker vote
shortDescription: Rep.-elect George Santos was skipped during a Congressional vote for a new speaker of the House after he failed to respond to multiple roll calls.

title: Recap: House speaker vote fails again, impasse breaks 100-year record
shortDescription: The vote for a new speaker of the House dragged into day three Thursday as Republican leader Rep. Kevin McCarthy lost a series of ballots.

title: In Child Welfare Cases, Most of Your Constitutional Rights Don’t Apply
shortDescription: The child welfare system rarely offers the same rights as the criminal justice system, leaving many families facing permanent separation without due process protections.

title: Patients Went to This Isolated Facility for Treatment. Instead, Nearly Two Dozen Were Charged With Crimes.
shortDescription: For years, residents at the Illinois facility received scant treatment for their developmental disabilities and mental illnesses, then faced felonies for lashing out at staff.

title: House Republicans Preparing Broad Inquiry Into F.B.I. and Security Agencies
shortDescription: Republicans plan to create a special subcommittee, led by a Trump ally, with a mandate to scrutinize open criminal investigations and classified intelligence.By Charlie Savage and Luke Broadwater

title: In Speaker Fight’s Final Hours, Arm-Twisting, Flaring Tempers and Calls From Trump
shortDescription: Speaker Kevin McCarthy’s slog to his post ended with a remarkably public show of intraparty strife that played out in a history-making overnight session.By Catie Edmondson

title: McCarthy Wins House Speakership After 15 Votes
shortDescription: Representative Kevin McCarthy of California delivered a speech that focused on unity. Then, members-elect and delegates were sworn in.By House Tv

title: Kevin McCarthy and the Return of the Pre-Trump G.O.P.
shortDescription: In the struggles over the speakership, the old G.O.P. world, with all its dysfunctions, stalemates and futility, has come again.By Ross Douthat

title: The Moment When Tempers Really Got Out of Control on the House Floor
shortDescription: Tensions flared when Representative Matt Gaetz sunk Kevin McCarthy’s 14th effort to be elected speaker of the House.By Luke Broadwater

title: Proposed GOP select panel would be empowered to review ‘ongoing criminal investigations’
shortDescription: The proposed “select subcommittee" would operate under the Judiciary Committee expected to be chaired by Rep. Jim Jordan (R-Ohio).
